---
title: "In Memoriam Bishop Patteson: Being with Additions the Substance of a Memoir Published in the ‘Literary Churchman’. "
---

## In Memoriam Bishop Patteson: Being with Additions the Substance of a Memoir Published in the ‘Literary Churchman’. 

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1872
**Genre:** Non-fiction; biography
**Format:** Booklet

**Publisher:** London: William Skeffington, 163 Piccadilly.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
